title: oblivia simplex
intro: Oblivia simplex, also known as Oblong Boxwood, is a species of flowering plant in the family Buxaceae. It is native to Southeast Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The Oblivia simplex plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, and has been used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Oblivia simplex can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed as a supplement or used topically to promote healing and relaxation.
